_comment: Versioned template of _shared/config/sites.json (the runtime registry of onboarded sites, gitignored). You normally never edit sites.json by hand: entries are added automatically by `python3 content_writer.py site init <site-slug>` (schema below, from the catalog) and, on the maintainer side, by `notion sync-sites`. Sites may carry extra optional keys (eeat_level, registre, blacklist, editorial_guides, sheet_id, notion_*_db_id...) added per site as needed.
